Rather than put his client's injured horse down, Ben adopts her and welcomes Cale into the family business. They train Soñador to race again as gr

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Super
programme.desc: After his wife (Liv Tyler) leaves him, a fry cook (Rainn Wilson) emulates a TV superhero and transforms himself into a costumed vigilante.

programme.title: College
programme.desc: After his girlfriend dumps him, high-school senior Kevin (Drake Bell) does not feel like attending freshman orientation weekend at Fairmont University, but his pals (Andrew Caldwell, Kevin Covais) drag him along anyway. Once there, the teens meet members of the rowdiest fraternity on campus, who introduce them to the college party scene, as well as a few sorority girls.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Following the death of Vesper Lynd, James Bond (Daniel Craig) makes his next mission personal. The hunt for those who blackmailed his lover leads him to ruthless businessman Dominic Greene (Mathieu Amalric), a key player in the organization which coerced Vesper. programme.title: Flight of the Intruder

Virgil Cole (Willem Dafoe), are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. When the daring duo come across a beautiful scientist (Penélope Cruz) who is juggling an escape from a warlord and a mission to stop the spread

programme.title: Wolves
programme.desc: Anthony is a standout player on his Manhattan high school's basketball team with seemingly everything going for him: a killer three-point shot, a loving girlfriend, and a chance at a scholarship to Cornell. But Anthony's dreams of playing college ball are jeopardized by his volatile father, a hard-drinking writer whose compulsive gambling threatens to derail the lives of both his wife and son.

programme.title: Changeland
programme.desc: A man meets up with his best friend in Thailand while going through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Pootie Tang
programme.desc: Adapted from a comedy sketch on HBO's The Chris Rock Show, Pootie Tang (Lance Crouther) is the ultimate superhero. A cool-walking, smooth-talking lady's man, Pootie is a hero and a role model to all the kids of the neighborhood. Everybody looks up to Pootie except evil Dick Lecter (Robert Vaughn), CEO of Lecter Corp., a company that makes cigarettes, alcohol and fast food. Pootie shows cool determ

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno
programme.desc: Candy (Charlize Theron) and Lonnie Earl (Billy Bob Thornton) are just crazy about each other. The problem: she's married to Roy (Patrick Swayze) and he's married to Darlene (Natasha Richardson). So far it's been a secret affair. But that's about to change, because this foursome is driving cross-country and headed for some big surprises.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity
programme.desc: Soon after moving into a suburban tract home, Katie (Katie Featherston) and Micah (Micah Sloat) become increasingly disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence. Hoping to capture evidence of it on film, they set up video cameras in the house but are not prepared for the terrifying events that follow.

programme.title: Shell
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood directs his second feature and stars as a hired gun charged with saving a small town from a gang of outlaws. Western starring Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill.

programme.title: Italian Job, The
programme.desc: Ex-convict Michael Caine hatches an audacious plan to steal $4 million, involving a bus, two Jaguars and, of course, three Mini Coopers. Comic adventure. Flashing images.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Holy Roman Empire where Europe's nations fiercely vie for supremacy and the Austrians, desiring more land, encroach upon Switzerland, a serene, pastoral nation.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Adventurer Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with undead Emperor Jet Li and an army of terracotta warriors. Contains moderate fantasy violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Aaron Taylor-Johnson is Kraven, the deadly supervillain on a path to become the greatest - and the most feared - hunter in the world.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Transformers prequel starring Hailee Steinfeld as a teenager who discovers and revives the battle-scarred Bumblebee in a junkyard. With John Cena and Justin Theroux.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: Explosive spy thriller starring Vin Diesel as an adrenalin-junkie agent hired to infiltrate a dangerous Russian crime ring. From the director of The Fast and the Furious.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partner's show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklater's biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Frank the sausage and the other groceries are promised of the great beyond. When he hears life after the supermarket isn't as much fun as he thought, Frank the sausage investigates. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill and Michael Cera.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan,

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: In World War II London, a writer falls in love with the wife of a British civil servant - but both men suspect her of infidelity with yet another man. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: Dive into the love story of a couple who reunited many years after a tragedy drove them apart. Tim Roth and Trine Dyrholm star.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An actor undergoes a medical procedure to transform his appearance, but his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare. Oscar-nominated drama with Sebastian Stan.

programme.title: Aisha
programme.desc: A young Nigerian woman seeking asylum in Ireland forms a tender friendship with an employee at her residence. Sky Original film starring Letitia Wright and Josh O'Connor.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Peggy faints and wakes up to find herself back in 1960, leading her to try to spot and correct the mistakes that led to disappointments and an unhappy marriage.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. Years later, they meet again in a strangely sweet situation.(107 min).

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Dazzling musical biopic detailing Sir Elton John's breakthrough years. Taron Egerton, Jamie Bell and Richard Madden star.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Tom Hanks carries this compelling Robinson Crusoe tale as the FedEx troubleshooter struggling to survive after he's marooned on a desert island. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: In 1920s Chicago, slick lawyer Richard Gere does his best to get showbiz jailbirds Catherine Zeta-Jones and Renee Zellweger off the hook. Dazzling winner of six Oscars.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Dazzling musical biopic detailing Sir Elton John's breakthrough years. Taron Egerton, Jamie Bell and Richard Madden star.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga...
programme.desc: Families, friends and foes discover the lure of the Old West as the Civil War divides the country. Kevin Costner and Sienna Miller star.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy has lots of little problems as he tries to mind a classful of riotous kiddies. Hyperactive family comedy with Steve Zahn and Anjelica Huston.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: Fox & Hare Save The Forest
programme.desc: Fox and Hare discover that Owl is missing. They set out with their friends to find him, but instead discover the mysterious lake. Animated adventure.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies
programme.desc: Join the Teen Titans on a Hollywood adventure as they fulfil their dream of starring in their very own superhero movie. With Kristen Bell and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx and Cameron Diaz star in this adaptation of the classic musical about a foster kid taken in by a wealthy businessman. Flashing images.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds voices the famous Pokémon hero as he puts his sleuthing skills to work to help a 21-year-old find his missing detective father.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man trapped inside a magical boardgame is freed with a zoo-full of rampaging jungle beasts. Wild fantasy adventure with Robin Williams.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: Four teens in detention discover an old video game that sucks them into the dangerous world of Jumanji. Dwayne Johnson stars.

programme.title: DC League Of Super Pets
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Family animation about a theatre-owning koala who holds a singing competition in a last-ditch bid to stay afloat.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx and Cameron Diaz star in this adaptation of the classic musical about a foster kid taken in by a wealthy businessman. Flashing images.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies
programme.desc: Join the Teen Titans on a Hollywood adventure as they fulfil their dream of starring in their very own superhero movie. With Kristen Bell and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: The life and work of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart seen through the eyes of his contemporary and rival, Antonio Salieri.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Adam Sandler stars as the irresponsible man-child who 'borrows' his roommate's son to prove to his girlfriend how mature he is, with surprising results. Cheeky comedy.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Mel Brooks' satire about the first black sheriff in an all-white town. Strong language/discriminatory content.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Comedy starring Gene Wilder as a deaf news-stand owner, who is framed for murder with his blind assistant. Language/mature themes/flashing images/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Spoilt brat Adam Sandler won't inherit daddy's millions unless he completes 12 years of school in six months. Vintage Sandler comedy.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Slick lawyer Jim Carrey is a big fibber, but when his son makes a wish, he can tell nothing but the truth for 24 hours. Comedy. Strong language/moderate sexual references.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: Smash-hit comedy following a single mother on her search for the perfect husband and father to baby Mikey (voiced by Bruce Willis). With John Travolta. Strong language.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Roseanne Barr voices the new addition to Kirstie Alley and John Travolta's family, and is just as opinionated as her toddler brother, voiced by Bruce Willis. Comedy sequel.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: Danny DeVito and Diane Keaton voice the new pets of couple Kirstie Alley and John Travolta, and their take on the world makes for some eye-opening insights. Sex references.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: New kid Daniel stands up to his bullies with the help of karate master Mr Miyagi in this family favourite. Starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: High-kicking karate student Daniel and his mentor Mr Miyagi travel to Japan to settle an old score. Family action sequel with Pat Morita and Ralph Macchio.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: Hothead Daniel dumps Mr Miyagi for a new coach. But without his ally, can the youngster defeat the toxic waste baron who is training an old enemy? Mild violence.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Rurangi
programme.desc: After leaving a decade earlier, a transgender activist returns to the remote community of Rurangi, hoping to reconnect with his father. Drama, starring Elz Carrad and Arlo Green.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: As they continue to recover from separate traumatic events, two young men gradually start to fall for each other. Drama, starring Matthew Fifer and Sheldon D Brown.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: Alice is a reclusive writer, resigned to a solitary life on the seaside cliffs of southern England while the Second World War rages across the Channel. When she opens her front door one day to find she has to adopt a young London evacuee named Frank, she's resistant. It's not long, however, before the two realise they have more in common in their pasts than Alice had assumed. Romantic drama, starr

programme.title: Mascarpone
programme.desc: A young gay man who must carve out a new path for himself after his husband - who he depends on financially - dumps him. Italian comedy drama, starring Giancarlo Commare and Eduardo Valdarnini.

programme.title: Minyan
programme.desc: New York City during the 1980s, and a young gay Russian immigrant looks to escape the constraints of his community and find a world teeming with possibilities. Drama, starring Samuel H Levine and Ron Rifkin.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: Lifelong pals Lucy and Jane face a test of friendship when one of them embarks on a personal journey. Romantic comedy drama, starring Dakota Johnson, Sonoya Mizuno and Jermaine Fowler.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmi's thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby, and his dying mother Gwen. Helen's life is a grind, but she has a chance at romance when a secret love returns. Writer/director Janis Pugh's drama, starring Louise Brealey and Annabel Scholey.

programme.title: A Nice Indian Boy
programme.desc: Naveen brings his fiancé Jay home to meet his traditional Indian family, and they come to terms with his white-orphan-artist boyfriend while planning the wedding of their dreams. Romantic comedy, starring Karan Soni and Jonathan Groff.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: A gay man makes a deal with his lesbian friend - a green-card marriage for him, in exchange for in vitro fertilisation treatments for her. Romantic comedy, starring Bowen Yang, Lily Gladstone and Kelly Marie Tran.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. It's the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starrin

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: You Can Live Forever
programme.desc: After moving into a Jehovah's Witness community, lesbian teenager Jamie begins a life-changing love affair with the daughter of a prominent Witness Elder. Drama, starring Anwen O'Driscoll and June Laporte.

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge
programme.desc: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves. Starring Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A young athlete descends into a world of terror when he's invited to train with a legendary champion whose charisma curdles into something darker.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List is about the race against time. From a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking.

programme.title: Across the Desert
programme.desc: Tafiti, a young meerkat, initially rejects friendship with Bristles, a bush pig. When his grandpa is bitten by a snake, Tafiti sets off to find the flower for the cure.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby and Grandma Gigi's road trip takes an unexpected turn when Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal.

programme.title: Honey Don't
programme.desc: Private investigator Margaret Qualley delves into a series of strange deaths linked to a mysterious church. Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans star.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: Tasked by Frankenstein to create a companion, Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change.

programme.title: We Bury the Dead
programme.desc: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise, they hunt. Daisy Ridley searches for her husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Language/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: One Last Deal
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent races to secure a final lucrative contract for his star client, as both their careers and lives hang in the balance. Starring Danny Dyer.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Beast Of War
programme.desc: A group of young soldiers find themselves stranded on a raft in the middle of the ocean and must battle for their lives against a giant, hungry great white shark.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Re-imagining of the classic horror from Stephen King's bestselling novel. A family moves to a rural house, and things soon start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun battle a malevolent force when they're sent to investigate the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: With America in the grip of a zombie apocalypse, Woody Harrelson and Jesse Eisenberg team up to survive. With Emma Stone. Violence/strong language.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Hit zombie comedy sequel. The group move into the American heartland, and have to face up to new, evolved zombies. With Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Hip horror movie about four female students who band together and become witches. Starring Fairuza Balk, Robin Tunney and Neve Campbell.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: Salem's Lot
programme.desc: Based on Stephen King's terrifying novel, this horror sees an author stumble upon a town under the threat of a bloodthirsty vampire.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Three decades since the rage virus took hold, one survivor leaves the safety of a fortified island on a mission into the mainland.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, two brothers return to their hometown, realising that an even greater evil is waiting for them.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
